# Notes Pipeline Template

Use this template for every new Notes post.

## 1) Idea capture

- Working title:
- Core insight (one sentence):
- Audience:
- Why now:

## 2) Draft brief

- Format: `essay | teardown | field note | playbook`
- Target length: `600-1200 words`
- Primary thesis:
- 3 supporting points:
- One story/proof:
- CTA:

## 3) Metadata

- Slug:
- Meta title (<=60 chars):
- Meta description (<=155 chars):
- OG image concept:
- Canonical URL:

## 4) Distribution

- LinkedIn post angle:
- 3 pull-quotes:
- Follow-up post concept:

## 5) Performance review (after publish)

- 7-day pageviews:
- Avg time on page:
- Top referrer:
- CTA outcome:
- What to iterate next:
